default.text: ⟦⟦ S̃h̃õr̃t̃ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ s̃h̃õw̃ s̃ũd̃d̃ẽñ ĩñc̃r̃ẽãs̃ẽs̃ ĩñ ĩñt̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ. ⟧⟧

early_burst.text: ⟦⟦ Ã s̃p̃ĩk̃ẽ ãp̃p̃ẽãr̃s̃ ẽãr̃l̃ỹ ãñd̃ c̃h̃ãñg̃ẽs̃ t̃h̃ẽ ĩñĩt̃ĩãl̃ p̃ãc̃ĩñg̃. ⟧⟧

late_burst.text: ⟦⟦ Ĩñt̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ s̃p̃ĩk̃ẽs̃ õc̃c̃ũr̃ ĩñ l̃ãt̃ẽ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃. ⟧⟧
